title: Star Wars Expansion
description: Introduces the Star Wars universe to Minecraft.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2527d573932560ee3c2b80cede0c3c38d24f29fc.png)                                                                         



                               About Star Wars Expansion

The FazBrick Studios Team presents Star Wars Expansion. Maintained and kept up to date for modern versions of Minecraft and fully compatible with multiplayer.

This project focuses on bringing a large part of the Star Wars universe into Minecraft in a dynamic and innovative way. Star Wars Expansion features ships, weapons, enemies, and new planets that will take you a long time to explore, delivering an experience that feels faithful to the Lucasfilm universe while giving Minecraft a whole new way to play.

The mod currently includes a wide variety of weapons and ships, along with one planet to explore and begin your adventure: Tatooine. This planet features different structures, dungeons, and villages to enhance immersion in this new universe.

The mod is currently in the early stages of development and will be constantly updated, adding new content and advancing versions.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eab04950e35537d3b73c2c3f3c666ef3128e464e_0.webp)

                               I can put this in Modpacks?

Of course! Feel free to add this mod to your modpacks. I encourage you to do so, just don't forget to give credit.

                                                           

                               Star Wars Expansion Features

Star Wars Expansion currently includes a large and solid repertoire of items and structures, allowing you to fully enjoy this experience. 


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Weapons:                                      

- Vibro-Axe
- Vibro Blade
- Stun Baton
- Gaderffii Stick
- DL-44 Pistol
- E-11 Blaster
- EE-3 Rifle
- Westar-34 Pistol

Spaceships:

- X-Wing
- TIE Fighter
- Landspeeder
- Speeder Bike
- Escape Pod
- AT-ST

Structures:

- Jedi Temple
- Broken Escape Pod
- Tatooine Village
- Tusken Campment
- Mos Eisley

Droids:

- Astromech Droids
- Protocol Droids
- Gonk Droid
- Mouse Droid
- T3-M4

Planets:

- Tatooine
- Kashyyyk
- Hoth
- Endor

</details>





                                     Getting Started


To start your adventure, you will need to find a crashed escape pod in the Overworld. You can repair this pod using a repair kit that can be crafted, restoring it to full functionality.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8077e9178f5af63a5892c00e965cfd85904ceff_0.webp)

Once repaired, you can board the escape pod and travel to the different planets offered by Star Wars Expansion using a galaxy planet selection system.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef2712d2d074521803475b20e40b203d7ce82825_0.webp)

Upon arriving on Tatooine, you can explore villages to trade and buy new materials, items, and weapons, while gathering resources to use in combat against the creatures that become your enemies.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31ed95813ffa8a0f7ddd50e1e8acd16891df4ddb_0.webp)

You can buy droids, weapons, and spaceships in these villages using the metals and materials you gather on the planet.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dee01e065bc71261ab24b1af6c47c051447119a8_0.webp)

In addition, you will find various Jedi temples scattered across the planet, where you can forge your lightsabers and become one with the Force.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a5d0b932e73c52ab44976299a2aa2ebef22fa61_0.webp)

This specifically includes RU-Minecraft.
